mapper.select: SELECT id, session_name as sessionName, archive_time as archiveTime, group_count as groupCount, avg_score as avgScore, max_score as maxScore FROM archive_session ORDER BY archive_time DESC

SELECT id, session_name as sessionName, archive_time as archiveTime, group_count as groupCount, avg_score as avgScore, max_score as maxScore, archive_data as archiveData FROM archive_session WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO archive_session (session_name, archive_time, group_count, avg_score, max_score, archive_data) VALUES (#{sessionName}, #{archiveTime}, #{groupCount}, #{avgScore}, #{maxScore}, #{archiveData})
